---
title: "The Successful Merchant:Sketches of the Life of Mr Samuel Budgett Late of Kingswood Hill"
---

## The Successful Merchant:Sketches of the Life of Mr Samuel Budgett Late of Kingswood Hill

**Author:** William Arthur
**Date:** 1852
**Imprint:** London: Hamilton Adams

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
